lingala.build_an_equivalent_ratio_family: Tonga libota ya ba ratio oyo ekokani
lingala.equivalent_ratio_table_for: Tableau ya ba ratio oyo ekokani mpo na
lingala.top_line_value_per_interval: Motuya ya molongo ya likolo mpo na interval moko
lingala.bottom_line_value_per_interval: Motuya ya molongo ya nse mpo na interval moko
lingala.n_1_top_unit_corresponds_to: Unit 1 ya molongo ya likolo eyokani na
lingala.bottom_units: ba unit ya molongo ya nse.
lingala.the_top_line_increases_by: Molongo ya likolo ezali komata na
lingala.per_interval_and_the_bottom_line_incre: na interval moko mpe molongo ya nse ezali komata na
lingala.enter_an_amount_greater_than_zero_for_: Kotisa motango oyo eleki zéro mpo na baponaki nyonso mibale.
lingala.both_options_have_the_same_cost_per_un: Baponaki nyonso mibale ezali na cost per unit moko.
lingala.option_a_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option A ezali na cost per unit ya moke.
lingala.option_b_has_the_lower_cost_per_unit: Option B ezali na cost per unit ya moke.
lingala.adjust_the_values_so_both_unit_rates_s: Bongisa mituya mpo unit rates nyonso mibale etikala na kati ya learning-model range.
lingala.rate_outside_model_range: Rate ezali libanda ya model range
lingala.a_fair_comparison_divides_each_cost_by: Bokokanisi ya sembo ekaboli cost moko na moko na motango na yango. Likambo ekoki mpe kozala na kitoko, kobebisa, to bamposa mosusu.
lingala.this_example_is_above_the_1000_learnin: Ndakisa oyo eleki ndelo ya 1000% ya learning model. Bongisa eteni to mobimba.
lingala.this_result_is_above_the_1_000_000_qua: Litomba oyo eleki ndelo ya motango 1,000,000. Bongisa mituya ya ndakisa.
lingala.the_percent_is_not_defined_when_the_wh: Pourcent elimbolami te tango mobimba ezali zéro. Kotisa mobimba ya positif mpo na kotonga tepe.
lingala.the_whole_is_not_defined_when_the_perc: Mobimba elimbolami te tango pourcent ezali zéro. Kotisa pourcent ya positif mpo na kotonga tepe.
lingala.ten_equal_sections_each_represent_10_o: Biteni zomi oyo ekokani, moko na moko ezali komonisa 10% ya mobimba moko.
lingala.each_outlined_section_is_exactly_10_of: Eteni moko na moko oyo basali molongo ezali mpenza 10% ya mobimba moko. Eteni oyo etondi ndambo ezali komonisa fraction ya sikisiki ya 10% wana.
lingala.complete_whole_tapes: ba tepe ya mobimba oyo ekoki;
lingala.enter_at_least_two_valid_coordinate_pa: Kotisa ata ba paire mibale ya coordonnées ya sembo, elongo na moko oyo motuya na yango ya x ezali zéro te.
lingala.not_proportional_the_evidence_does_not: Ezali proportionnel te: bilembeteli ezali komonisa te unit rate moko oyo ebongwanaka te oyo eleki na origine.
lingala.x_values_comma_separated_2: Mituya ya x, bakaboli na virgule
lingala.y_values_comma_separated_2: Mituya ya y, bakaboli na virgule
lingala.use_the_same_number_of_x_and_y_values_: Salela motango moko ya mituya ya x mpe y. Graphe oyo ya quadrant ya liboso esengeli motango oyo ezali négatif te na molongo moko na moko.
lingala.fix_the_coordinate_list_before_making_: Bongisa liste ya coordonnées liboso ya kozwa mokano mpo na proportionnalité:
lingala.table_and_unit_rate_evidence: Bilembeteli oyo euti na tableau mpe unit rate
lingala.no_valid_paired_rows_yet: Naino milongo oyo esangisami ya sembo ezali te.
lingala.a_proportional_model_ray_is_extended_t: Rayon ya modèle proportionnel epusami na origine.
lingala.no_complete_set_of_points_is_available: Ensemble mobimba ya ba point ezali te mpo na kosala graphe.
lingala.table_evidence_all_defined_y_x_values_: Bilembeteli ya tableau: mituya nyonso ya y ÷ x oyo elimbolami ekokani na
lingala.the_entered_points_include_0_0_and_fol: ba point oyo bakotisi ezali na (0,0) mpe elandi rayon ya modèle.
lingala.the_model_ray_extends_the_constant_rel: rayon ya modèle epusaka boyokani oyo ebongwanaka te na (0,0), atako origine ekotisami te.
lingala.check_for_changing_y_x_values_a_nonzer: Tala soki ezali na mituya ya y ÷ x oyo ebongwani, motuya ya y oyo ezali zéro te tango x = 0, to ba point oyo ezali te na molongo moko ya semba oyo eleki na origine.
lingala.move_between_representations_and_expla: Tambola kati ya ba représentation mpe limbola boyokani ya kobakisa mbala.
lingala.best_for_fair_comparisons_because_ever: Malamu koleka mpo na bokokanisi ya sembo mpo bakomaka lisusu likambo moko na moko mpo na unit moko.
lingala.a_ratio_measured_against_a_whole_of_10: Ratio oyo bameki na mobimba ya 100; salela eteni = pourcent × mobimba.
lingala.a_straight_line_through_the_origin_sho: Molongo ya semba oyo eleki na origine ezali komonisa multiplicateur moko oyo ebongwanaka te longwa na x tii na y.
lingala.estimate_first_preserve_units_and_ask_: Meka liboso, bomba ba unit, mpe tuna soki mitango nyonso mibale ebongwani na lolenge ya kobakisa mbala.
